Best AI research tools for DTC ecommerce teams

Compared by fit, pricing model, and Shopify use case.

ToolCategoryPricingBest fit
ChatGPTResearch and analyticsFreemiumBest as a flexible thinking partner when paired with clear ecommerce workflows.
ClaudeResearch and analyticsFreemiumUseful for summarizing long exports, support logs, and competitor pages.
PerplexityResearch and analyticsFreemiumUseful for quick research before writing buying guides or comparison pages.
HotjarResearch and analyticsPaidUse it to find where AI-written pages still confuse shoppers.
Microsoft ClarityResearch and analyticsFreeA good first analytics layer for finding checkout and PDP friction.
StoreAI Stack

Independent editorial directory for Shopify AI tools. Some links may be affiliate links.
